About Me

Hi there,

Thank you for checking out my website.

My name is Hasan Berkhan Özkan. I live in Istanbul. I am Mobile and Web App Developer. I have been coding since 2015 and still trying to learn new technologies. You can check out some of my work at the Portolio page and Github page.
